## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Language/compiler change
- [ ] Standard library change
- [ ] Documentation change
- [ ] Refactor or cleanup
- [ ] Tests only

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] Added or updated tests/docs as needed

## Notes for reviewers

Mention any compatibility concerns, known limitations, or follow-up work.
